what: Pure MXFP4 kernel: use MXFP4 for both K and V (dot_scaled for K, manual dequant for V). Halves V bandwidth vs FP8. Unpack fp4x2 to bf16 for V, apply e8m0 block scales.
why: V loads are ~50% of stage1 bandwidth. MXFP4 V is half the bytes of FP8 V (288B vs 576B per token). Previous v118 tried bf16 V and regressed. MXFP4 V saves bandwidth at cost of dequant ALU.
